title: Total implant of middle ear prosthesis
abstract: This invention relates generally to systems and causes methods for enhancing hearing in patients suffering from conductive hearing loss and/or sensorineural hearing loss. After going through the background of invention the clinical presentation of patients who would benefit from ossiculoplasty is quite variable. Conductive hearing loss may be the result of ossicular erosion or fixation from chronic ear disease, blunt or penetrating trauma, or congenital or neoplastic causes. It may also be associated with inner ear causes. These inner ear include superior semicircular canal dehiscence and an enlarged vestibular aqueduct. The said prosthesis is designed in such a way that once implanted it will work till lifetime of patient without any external source of electrical energy, this prosthesis overcome all the limitations of the middle ear implant designed till date.
claims:
Claims A prosthetic middle ear implant is made up an assembly comprising of components, prosthetic annulus ring fixator: Designed as a "ring inside a ring" so that the diameter of the annulus can be changed from 6mm to 11 mm as per need during installation inside the ear. This artificial annulus, will fix snugly inside the natural bony annulus of ear in anatomical location of tympanic membrane, prosthetic Ossicular chain: Made of units- Malleus (8mm), incus (5mm), stapes (3mm), each joined to each other with hinge type of movable joints with lever mechanism, prosthetic tympanic membrane attached to a ring: It is made of inert material with elasticity same as that of natural tympanic membrane and a very high tensile strength, is installed on the prosthetic ring annulus such that, inner border of the prosthetic tympanic membrane is touching the lateral process of prosthetic Malleus, tympanic membrane to handle of Malleus attacher projection with threading: A slender projection coming from tip of handle of prosthetic Malleus pierces the prosthetic tympanic membrane, nut fixer: A small lightweight nut is the inserted along the threading on 4 th part (attacher) such that the prosthetic tympanic membrane approximates with the manubrium of prosthetic Malleus. The prosthetic annulus ring fixator as mentioned in the claim 1 is composed of 4 Titanium plates such that 2 peripheral plates of size 50Â° circumference and 2 central plates each measuring 100Â° in closed ring form which is of 6mm diameter; this when opened to full extent the peripheral plate becomes 35Â° circumference and the central plate becomes of size 70Â° ; the full expanded diameter of annular fixator reaches 11 mm. These plates will have nails on its outer circumference along with screw in it to open the annular fixator. On the titanium plate on its inner circumference in the centre there will be a keyhole for fixing screw. There will be 4 provisional keyholes on the annular ring to fix the prosthetic TM. These screw holes will be on the inner circumference of the annular ring such that they do not hinder the working of plastic plate inside the titanium sub- plates. There will be another screw on the inner aspect of titanium plate for stabilization of Ossicular chain, Plastic plates made up of inert synthetic material, are placed inside the titanium plates, which will have serrations on their outer circumference that will be complimentary to the serrations present on inner aspect of titanium plate's serrations whereas the serrations present on inner circumference will be complimentary to the serrations present on the fixing screw. 

 Fixing screw: It is a star shaped screw, which has serrations complimentary to the serrations on the plastic plate on inner aspect. The Ossicular chain as mentioned in claiml . Is made up of 3 subunits namely prosthetic Malleus, prosthetic incus, prosthetic stapes Prosthetic Malleus: It is a 7.7mm long ossicle made up of Head, Neck, Manubrium and Lateral Process. (Head + Neck = 4.5mm, Manubrium = 4.7mm) Angle between Head-Neck and Manubrium is 100 degree Angle between Manubrium and Lateral process of Malleus is 150 degree. A perpendicular line Drawn from centre point of Malleus divides the above angle into 2 components: - Angle between perpendicular and manubrium sterni is 5 degree Angle between perpendicular and short process of Malleus is 135 degree. The angle between the short process and Head-Neck is 110 degree. Prosthetic Incus: It is a hammer shaped structure measuring 6.5mm in length and 4.9 mm in width. It is made up of long process-4.7mm and Short process+Body-4.9mm Lateral process of incus: It is of length 4.7 mm which distally advances and bifurcates in such a way that it forms a Head- Mirror Joint with Prosthetic Stapes. The gap between two long processes of Malleus and Incus is 2.8mm and they are parallel to each other in such a way that Malleus handle lies anterolateral^ and incus long process lies posteromedially. Thickness of both long processes is 1 mm. Prosthetic Stapes is a Straight rod like structure which on lateral end forms Head- MirrorJoint with long process of incus and medially forms a Copper-T like joint with the Stapes footplate. The long arm of Prosthetic stapes is slightly curved in the posterior aspect, this Copper-T is enclosed in a cylindrical tube, which on pulling back opens up the Copper-T Prongs in the inner ear. The ball on the lateral end of stapes snugly fits into the bifurcated 2 arms that has plane of motion in Y- Axis. Arms of Stapes are of Length 2.6mm + 1.4mm (prongs) = 4mm. 1.4mm of terminal part of arm of stapes will have a recoiling capacity when the cylindrical tube is withdrawn backward. The prosthetic tympanic membrane mentioned in claim 1. has thickness of 3mm antero- inferiorly, which will taper to 1 mm postero-superiorly, such that the hole of 0.5 mm of diameter is present to accommodate the screw arising from tip of handle of Malleus Circumferentially clipping system will be present that will fix the TM on the annular fixator. For additional support there will be 4 screws that will be tightened on the annular fixator. Bolt: Through the tip of the handle of Malleus there is a projection screw that is treaded complementary to the nut fixer. 6. Nut: A 1 mm diameter hexagonal shaped nut made up of titanium/ sialistic material. It will possess complementary threading to the bolt. This nut will be preceded by rotational movement with the help of key to reach the tip of handle of Malleus fixing the TM over it. 570 575 580 585
